data.body: RESURRECTION HANDLED: jira-reb-695 removal was DEFEATED — after hard-deleting REB-695, the reconciler OUTBOUND RE-CREATED it as REB-777 (created 16:06 by reconciler/Joe Oakhart, label rebar-id:jira-reb-777) and re-imported as jira-reb-777. DEEPER ROOT CAUSE of Task#1's question: hard-deleting a bound Jira issue triggers reconciler re-create (relates to open ticket c244); local tombstone not respected. DURABLE FIX applied: closed local jira-reb-777 + transitioned REB-777->Done in Jira (HTTP 204) — a closed/Done pair is reconciler-stable (no 404 -> no re-create) and out of active fetch scope. Lesson: retire bridged junk by CLOSING both sides, never by deleting. Systemic fix = import-exclusion for experiment tickets and/or respect local tombstone in outbound re-create (c244).
